/usr/bin/c++ -O3 -DNDEBUG -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/gasbox.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/gasbox.dir/src/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/gasbox.dir/src/Box.cpp.o CMakeFiles/gasbox.dir/src/Simulation.cpp.o CMakeFiles/gasbox.dir/src/ParticleSoA.cpp.o CMakeFiles/gasbox.dir/libs/imgui/imgui.cpp.o CMakeFiles/gasbox.dir/libs/imgui/imgui_draw.cpp.o CMakeFiles/gasbox.dir/libs/imgui/imgui_tables.cpp.o CMakeFiles/gasbox.dir/libs/imgui/imgui_widgets.cpp.o CMakeFiles/gasbox.dir/libs/implot/implot.cpp.o CMakeFiles/gasbox.dir/libs/implot/implot_items.cpp.o -o gasbox  -Wl,-rpath,/usr/local/lib64 libs/imgui-sfml/libImGui-SFML.a /usr/local/lib64/libsfml-graphics.so.3.0.0 /usr/local/lib64/libsfml-window.so.3.0.0 /usr/local/lib64/libsfml-system.so.3.0.0 /usr/lib64/libGL.so
